subject: Board packet items 4a, 4b, 4c - your reads by Nov 15
snippet: Andrew, I need your board-ready read on STEM Phase 2 cost picture 48 hours ahead.
body:
Andrew,

I need your board-ready read on STEM Phase 2 cost picture, dual-language funding recommendation, and Distinction accountability posture posted to me by end of Nov 15 so I can prebrief Diane. Keep the STEM number defensible - the board will press on the escalation.

Marsh

subject: Completed: BICG-2026-011 Phase 2 Escalation Addendum
snippet: Envelope completed. All parties have signed BICG-2026-011.
body: Envelope BICG-2026-011 was completed on 2026-10-30. The escalation addendum applies +$10,560 to the Phase 2 base contract per Section 4.2 (8% tier, BLS index 6.1%). Download the completed PDF from your DocuSign inbox.

subject: Bilingual newsletter for November - concrete beats abstract
snippet: Andrew, the Oct 7 Song Ngu Suy Nghi send under-delivered.
body:
Andrew,

The Oct 7 Song Ngu Suy Nghi bilingual send opened at 28.7 percent, below our bilingual average of 34.5. Rosa and I read the subject line as too abstract. For November, can you draft in your voice with concrete items - PTA drive dates, the dual-language listening session, one story from a family? I will format and schedule. Please do not publish from your account. Send me the draft.

Angela

subject: HVAC balance re-check on STEM lab - vendor scheduled
snippet: Rob's crew rescheduled the final HVAC balance to Nov 12.
body: Andrew, Rob's crew moved the final HVAC balance to Nov 12 morning. Facilities has FAC-421401 open on that. I'll be on site to verify against Jira STEM-215 - looks like a duplicate row on our side, so we should de-dup before we roll the number to Marsh.

subject: Following up on Hoa's evening restlessness
snippet: Andrew, keep the Trazodone conservative - only if she is still up past 10.
body:
Andrew,

Tight and short - keep the Trazodone conservative. Only if she is still up past 10 pm and pacing. Do not stack with the afternoon Aricept dose. Kim can text me directly. Call me Sunday morning if you want to walk through the week's log.

Danny

subject: Lotus Garden 1st-Sat December confirm
snippet: Anh Andrew, Lotus Garden held Dec 5 7-9pm for us.
body:
Anh Andrew,

Lotus Garden is holding Dec 5, 7 to 9 pm for Golden Phoenix. Same tip-split, we run through Square. Setlist same as October with two Trinh Cong Son adds. Say confirm and I lock it.

Minh

subject: Nov 17 board - order of your items
body:
Andrew, agenda order for Nov 17: item 4a STEM Phase 2 ratification at 6:35 pm, item 4b dual-language expansion funding at 7:05 pm, item 4c Distinction accountability directional at 7:35 pm. Keep 4a to eight minutes plus five for questions. Marsh has your name for the whole block.

Diane

subject: Cross-campus partnerships heading into board readout
snippet: Nadia here - flagging Cypress Ridge and Magnolia Grove as stale.
body:
Andrew,

Heading into Nov 17, our joint pipeline shows Cypress Ridge bilingual PD (SF-CX-101) and Magnolia Grove STEM open-house (SF-CX-107) as In-Delivery but with no activity since early September. Piney Creek (SF-CX-141) is At-Risk on the PTA sponsor side, Angela raised it. Do you want me to fold a one-liner on each into item 5a or would you rather I keep it in my portfolio section?

Nadia

subject: Sunday check-in - I can move to 9am
snippet: Ba, I can push to 9 if that's better for Kim's window.
body:
Ba, I can push our Sunday call to 9 am if that's better for Kim's window with Ba Noi. Let me know. Also picked up the HCPOA copy from my file - I'll bring it Sunday. Love you.

Lily

subject: Phase 3 LOI - want your read before I chase
snippet: Andrew - envelope 019 is sitting in draft. Push it or hold?
body:
Andrew, envelope BICG-2026-019 (Phase 3 LOI) is sitting in draft on our side. I'm not going to send it into DocuSign until you tell me. If the board goes clean on Phase 2 ratification Nov 17, I want to be ready with the LOI within the week. Say hold if you want it parked.

Rob

subject: Board readout section 6a - our slide
snippet: Angela and I split 6a - engagement summary is mine, family stories is hers.
body:
Andrew, Angela and I split section 6a. Engagement summary is mine (Mailchimp + Amplitude, bilingual vs English), family stories is hers. We each need one bullet from you. Yours can be the dual-language listening session outcome and one number you're comfortable citing publicly. Give me by Nov 15 if you can.

Rosa

subject: Weekly summary - Nov 2 to Nov 8
snippet: Good week overall. Two nights of restlessness.
body:
Anh Andrew,

Good week overall for co Hoa. Two nights of restlessness (Nov 4 and Nov 6). No falls. Morning pills 8:00 to 8:30 held consistent. She sang along to two Trinh Cong Son tracks Wed afternoon - was a good hour. Grocery list will be short this week, I already have rice and fish sauce.

Kim
